narrative:
Bloomfield-Mespo Local Sd (Trumbull) school district has 1,186 registered voters, with 61.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.5 percentage points.
